cases.prompt: 우리 서비스 config랑 design token JSON 일관성 검증해줘

assertions.text: Produces a JSON-schema-based consistency framework with automated validation rules.
Determines which parts need strict consistency (API contracts, design tokens, config) vs flexible parts.

cases.prompt: Help me maintain uniformity of API contracts across services

assertions.text: Identifies API contracts as a strict-consistency zone requiring schema validation.
Defines automated validation rules to enforce consistency rather than manual checks.

cases.prompt: 디자인 시스템 토큰을 세션 간에 유지하고 design drift를 막아줘

assertions.text: Recognizes persistent cross-session design-system token storage and drift auditing belongs to design-system-keeper, not data/config schema guarding.
